text:
Created attachment 184551
Update to 5.32.0

Simple update to 5.32.0
Added en_GB locale.

Changelog ( 
http://lalescu.ro/liviu/fet/forum/index.php?topic=3252.0 ):
Implemented the teachers' and students' timetable view time horizontal from the FET interface
Added the en_GB (British English) locale

Poudriere testport passed (http://freebsd.uzsolt.hu/logs/deskutils/fet/10amd64-default/fet-5.32.0.log).
